Inflatable Rentals in Port Hawkesbury NS

Nova Kingdom Rentals is Bridgewater-based and delivers inflatable rentals to Port Hawkesbury NS, a industrial and commercial gateway to Cape Breton on the Strait of Canso. Cape Breton's strong Celtic community spirit, summer festivals, and tight-knit neighbourhoods make it a natural destination for our inflatables, games, and party packages for birthdays, schools, and community events.

Travel from Bridgewater to Port Hawkesbury NS is approximately 235 km. The first 15 km is free; travel beyond that is quoted at $0.72/km (estimate ~$158 one way, confirmed before booking). Availability, setup suitability, staffing requirements, and deposit details are all confirmed before your booking is finalized.

Featured Rentals

  • Crown Island Combo - Combo Inflatable, By quote, Wet-use - Tropical combo with bounce, slide, and splash/pool fun.
  • Crown Rush 42 - Large Inflatable, $450, Wet-use - Large 42ft water slide and obstacle course combo.
  • Crown Cascade - Water Slide, $319, Wet-use - Colourful water slide for splash-ready summer fun.
  • Crown Dino Combo - Combo Inflatable, $279, Dry-use - Dinosaur-themed combo inflatable with bounce and slide fun.

Best For

  • Birthday parties
  • School events
  • Community celebrations
  • Outdoor summer parties

Frequently Asked Questions

Do you deliver inflatable rentals to Port Hawkesbury NS?
Yes. Nova Kingdom Rentals is based in Bridgewater and serves Port Hawkesbury NS by availability and travel quote. Travel is 235 km from our base; the first 15 km is free, and additional distance is quoted at $0.72/km.
How do I confirm my booking?
Submitting a request does not confirm your booking. We review availability, travel cost, setup suitability, and deposit requirements, then send you confirmation details. Your booking is only confirmed once a deposit is received.
What is the wind limit for inflatables?
Our rental agreement requires inflatables to be taken down or not set up if sustained winds reach 38 km/h or higher. Safety is the priority and we monitor conditions on your event day.
What deposit is required?
A deposit is required to hold your date. The deposit amount and payment method (e-Transfer is preferred) are confirmed when we send your booking details.
What events are popular for inflatable rentals in Port Hawkesbury NS?
In Port Hawkesbury NS we most commonly supply inflatables and party packages for backyard birthday parties, school fun days, community festivals, and summer outdoor events. Tell us your event type and we'll recommend the right setup.
